# TraceContext.HasBaggage method

Returns `true` when *meta* carries a W3C-conformant `baggage`. Mirrors TS `hasBaggage`. (R-15.4.1-c)

```csharp
public static bool HasBaggage(JsonObject meta)
```

| parameter | description |

| meta | The `_meta` object. |

## Return Value

`true` when a valid `baggage` is present.
